mapper.insert: INSERT INTO authorization_request ( id, job_id, task_run_id, loop_node_id, request_type, source_type, source_id, requested_delta_json, status ) VALUES ( #{id,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{jobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{taskRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{loopNodeId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{requestType}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceId}, CAST(#{requestedDeltaJson} AS JSON), 'PENDING' )
mapper.select: SELECT BIN_TO_UUID(id) AS id, BIN_TO_UUID(job_id) AS jobId, BIN_TO_UUID(task_run_id) AS taskRunId, BIN_TO_UUID(loop_node_id) AS loopNodeId, request_type AS requestType, source_type AS sourceType, source_id AS sourceId, CAST(requested_delta_json AS CHAR) AS requestedDeltaJson, status, CAST(decision_json AS CHAR) AS decisionJson, created_at AS createdAt, decided_at AS decidedAt FROM authorization_request WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at
mapper.update: UPDATE authorization_request SET status = #{targetStatus}, decision_json = CAST(#{decisionJson} AS JSON), decided_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE id = #{id,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status = #{expectedStatus}
